reason: An alcoholic screenwriter in Vegas must choose between his moral duty and saving an innocent man.
A tatooer offered to rescue his daughter from killers must decide if he’ll risk his life for justice.
A biker (Sean Connery) fights corruption in his adopted hometown, forced to kill a friend or watch it burn.
A man hires a detective to expose a conspiracy, torn between doing what’s right and preserving his career.
Firefighter must steal from a crime lord to save his son’s life, torn between law and fatherhood.
A devoted father infiltrates a skinhead gang to protect his child and redefine his own code of justice.
A man returns to society after killing on order, faced with a choice between survival and redemption.
A doppelgänger revenge plot forces a federal agent to choose between his mission and his own humanity.
A washed-up rocker hires an amateur PI to unearth a scandal, teetering between profit and protecting loved ones.
An online vigilante’s obsession with an unsolved murder compels him to frame an innocent man or save him.
